name: Goat Cheese and Spinach Turnovers
recipeInstructions:
Makes 12
Heat oil in a heavy large skillet over medium heat. Add onion and garlic and sauté 5 minutes. Increase heat to high. Add spinach and sauté until wilted, about 5 minutes. Drain spinach mixture, pressing on solids to release as much liquid as possible. Transfer to bowl and cool completely. Add goat cheese, pine nuts, parmesan, rosemary and lemon peel. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Place 1 phyllo sheet on work surface. Cut lengthwise into 3 strips. Brush with butter. Place 1 rounded tbsp filling at one end of dough strip. Starting at one corner, fold pastry over filling, forming triangle. Repeat, folding up the length of pastry as for flag. Brush with butter. Repeat with remaining pastry, butter and filling. Transfer turnovers to baking sheet. Cover and chill. Preheat oven to 375°F. Bake turnovers until golden, about 12 minutes. Cool slightly and serve.
